raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1289 will help increase agricultural revenue in California.",
    "California aims to become a leader in supplying and processing plant-based foods.",
    "Large portions of California's agricultural lands are primarily used to cultivate feed crops for livestock, contributing to methane and nitrous oxide emissions.",
    "Transitioning to plant-based agriculture can reduce California's greenhouse gas emissions.",
    "The Smart Climate Agriculture Program will provide grants to small and mid-sized farmers for transitioning from animal to plant-based agriculture.",
    "AB 1289 will offer technical assistance and develop best practices for farmers transitioning their lands.",
    "Farmers transitioning to plant-based agriculture can contribute to combating climate change through sustainable practices.",
    "Small to mid-sized family farms that transition to plant-based agriculture can create job opportunities due to growing market demand.",
    "The market for plant-based food in the U.S. reached $5 billion in 2019.",
    "Sales of plant-based meat, eggs, and dairy products are predicted to soar in 2021.",
    "The demand for plant-based foods is rapidly increasing."
  ]
}
```
